name: Chess Learning Game
description: Interactive chess game with AI opponent for learning tactics

tools.name: start_chess_game
tools.description: Start a new chess game against the AI. Returns the initial board state.

tools.name: get_board_state
tools.description: Get the current chess board state in FEN notation for analysis. Use this when the student asks for help or advice during a game.

tools.name: get_move_history
tools.description: Get the list of all moves made in the current game.
